One dollar and eighty-seven cents. That was all. Della had only this money. She wanted to buy Jim a gift. Christmas was tomorrow. She was sad about the money. She sat down and cried. She loved Jim very much. He worked hard every day. She wanted something special for him. But she had no money. She looked in the mirror. Her hair was very long. It was beautiful brown hair. She had an idea about her hair. She could sell her hair. Hair was worth money sometimes. She put on her coat. She went to the street. She found a hair shop. The woman bought her hair. Della got twenty dollars for it. Now she had money for Jim. She was happy but sad. Her hair was gone now. She looked very different without hair. She went to find a gift. She saw a beautiful watch chain. It was perfect for Jim's watch. Jim loved his gold watch. The chain cost twenty dollars. She bought the chain for Jim. She went home with the gift. She was worried about her hair. What would Jim think about it. She made dinner and waited. Jim came home from work. He looked at Della strangely. He saw her short hair. He was very surprised about it. Della explained about the hair. She showed him the watch chain. Jim smiled at her sadly. He had a surprise too. He sold his watch today. He bought beautiful combs for her hair. The combs were for her long hair. Now the gifts were not useful. But they loved each other more. The gifts showed their true love. They were the wisest people of all.
